channel.title: The MelbourneWebDesigners.com Journal
channel.description: Web design, platform and AI-search visibility guides for Melbourne businesses.

item.title: The Web Accessibility Rules Australian Small Businesses Keep Missing
item.description: Discover the essential web accessibility rules that Australian small businesses often overlook, ensuring compliance and inclusivity for all users.

item.title: 7 Red Flags When Hiring a Melbourne Web Design Agency
item.description: Learn the top 7 red flags to watch for when hiring a web design agency in Melbourne. Protect your investment and ensure quality outcomes for your project.

item.title: Google Business Profile + AI Search: The Local Visibility Stack for 2026
item.description: Explore how Google Business Profile and AI search will shape local visibility for Melbourne businesses in 2026 and what strategies to adopt.

item.title: How to Brief a Web Designer: The Template That Saves $2k of Revisions
item.description: Learn how to effectively brief a web designer with our comprehensive template, saving you time and money on revisions in Melbourne's competitive market.

item.title: Website Redesign vs Rebuild: What Should Melbourne Businesses Choose?
item.description: Explore the key differences between website redesign and rebuild for Melbourne businesses. Learn which option suits your needs and budget best.

item.title: WordPress vs Shopify vs Webflow in 2026 — the 10-Minute Decision for Melbourne Businesses
item.description: The honest decision framework Melbourne agencies use — which platform wins for content sites, e-commerce and marketing sites in 2026, what each really costs, and the three mistakes that lock businesses into the wrong stack.

item.title: Do AI Assistants Recommend Your Melbourne Business? How to Check — and How to Fix It
item.description: ChatGPT recommends just 1.2% of local businesses. Here's the 10-minute test Melbourne businesses can run today, and the seven fixes that actually move AI-search visibility in 2026.

item.title: The 20-Minute AI Search Tune-Up — llms.txt, Schema and the Basics Most Melbourne Websites Miss
item.description: Only ~10% of websites have llms.txt and most Melbourne sites still block or ignore AI crawlers. Here's the practical 20-minute checklist to make your site readable — and quotable — by ChatGPT, Perplexity and Google AI.
